summary: Polished recording captures a dreamy second set and lively audience banter, delivering a solid 1976 show.
review: The performance is highlighted by an ethereal second‑set that reviewers call 'otherworldly,' and the onstage banter between Scarlet and Dancin' adds extra charm. The recording is praised as good and nicely polished, offering clear sound even though the exact source type isn’t specified.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews give 4‑star ratings and consistently praise both the show (especially the second set) and the recording quality, indicating a solid performance with a clean, well‑mastered audio source.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note the recording is good, nicely polished by C.M., and clear enough to enjoy the show; no specific issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set described as dreamy and 'otherworldly' with memorable audience banter, overall a good and enjoyable performance.
